center.name: 苏丹港 (城市)
center.summary: 苏丹港 (城市)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紅海燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is known only from a single specimen, found in May 1984 at the Sanganeb lighthouse, north-east of Port Sudan, Sudan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is known only from a single specimen, found in May 1984 at the Sanganeb lighthouse, north-east of Port Sudan, Sudan
